name: Output Formatting Module
description: Output formatting module providing ANSI terminal colors, JSON serialization, clipboard integration, and markdown table rendering for the Ascend CLI tool

functions.name: _colorize
functions.description: Apply ANSI color codes to markdown-formatted report text based on line patterns (headers, status keywords)
postconditions: Returns text with ANSI color codes applied
Each line is processed independently
Lines starting with '# ' or '## ' are bold cyan
Lines starting with '### ' are bold
Lines containing 'Blocked' are red
Lines containing 'Active' or 'On Track' are green
Lines containing 'At Risk' are yellow
Lines starting with 'Generated:' or '---' are dim
Other lines remain unchanged except for newline preservation

functions.name: print_report
functions.description: Print report text to stdout with optional ANSI coloring, auto-detecting TTY if use_color not specified

inputs.name: use_color
inputs.description: Whether to apply color; None means auto-detect from stdout TTY

postconditions: Text is printed to stdout
If use_color is None, color is applied only if stdout is a TTY
If use_color is True, _colorize is applied
If use_color is False, text is printed unmodified

structured_side_effects.description: Prints report text to standard output

functions.name: print_json
functions.description: Print data as formatted JSON to stdout with 2-space indentation

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Data to serialize and print as JSON

error_cases.name: json_serialization_error
error_cases.condition: data contains non-serializable objects that cannot be converted by default=str

postconditions: Data is serialized to JSON with indent=2 and default=str
JSON is printed to stdout

structured_side_effects.description: Prints JSON-formatted data to standard output

functions.name: print_status
functions.description: Print a status message to stderr with dim styling if stderr is a TTY
postconditions: Message is written to stderr
If stderr is a TTY, message is wrapped with dim ANSI codes
If stderr is not a TTY, message is printed plain with newline

structured_side_effects.description: Prints status message to standard error

functions.name: copy_to_clipboard
functions.description: Copy text to clipboard via pbcopy command (macOS only) with 5-second timeout

error_cases.name: timeout_expired
error_cases.condition: pbcopy does not complete within 5 seconds

error_cases.name: pbcopy_not_found
error_cases.condition: pbcopy command is not available (non-macOS or not in PATH)

postconditions: Returns True if pbcopy succeeds (returncode == 0)
Returns False on timeout, missing pbcopy, or OS error
Text is UTF-8 encoded before passing to pbcopy

structured_side_effects.description: Modifies system clipboard via pbcopy subprocess

functions.name: format_table
functions.description: Format data as a markdown table with auto-calculated column widths

inputs.name: rows
inputs.description: Data rows, each a list of cell values

postconditions: Returns 'No data.' if rows is empty
Otherwise returns markdown table with pipe-delimited columns
Column widths are calculated from max(header_len, max_cell_len)
Cells are left-justified and padded to column width
Missing cells in short rows are rendered as empty strings
All cell values are converted to strings

functions.name: render_output
functions.description: Unified output handler that routes to JSON or markdown rendering and optionally copies to clipboard

inputs.name: copy
inputs.description: Whether to copy output to clipboard

error_cases.name: json_serialization_error
error_cases.condition: data contains non-serializable objects in json_mode or non-str data

postconditions: If json_mode is True, prints data as JSON and optionally copies
If json_mode is False and data is str, calls print_report and optionally copies
If json_mode is False and data is not str, prints data as JSON and optionally copies
If copy is True, calls copy_to_clipboard with the output text

structured_side_effects.description: Optionally copies output to clipboard if copy=True

invariants: ANSI color codes are defined as module constants: _RESET, _BOLD, _DIM, _GREEN, _YELLOW, _RED, _CYAN
All JSON serialization uses indent=2 and default=str for consistency
Status messages always go to stderr, not stdout
Color auto-detection uses sys.stdout.isatty() for reports and sys.stderr.isatty() for status
